nodes.name: Window
nodes.explanation: Root native window backdrop. Not a content layer or Liquid Glass content surface.

raw.name: Window
raw.explanation: Root native window backdrop. Not a content layer or Liquid Glass content surface.

nodes.name: GenericFilterableSurface
nodes.explanation: GenericFilterableList searchAiPresets owns a custom full-width list surface; it must not fall back to the launcher split shell.

raw.name: GenericFilterableSurface
raw.explanation: GenericFilterableList searchAiPresets owns a custom full-width list surface; it must not fall back to the launcher split shell.

nodes.name: GenericFilterableHeader
nodes.explanation: Functional header holds the search field and result count with a 12px gap.

raw.name: GenericFilterableHeader
raw.explanation: Functional header holds the search field and result count with a 12px gap.

nodes.name: GenericFilterableSearch
nodes.explanation: Search uses a 22px visual text lane inside a 28px minimum hit target.

raw.name: GenericFilterableSearch
raw.explanation: Search uses a 22px visual text lane inside a 28px minimum hit target.

nodes.name: GenericFilterableCount
nodes.explanation: searchAiPresets count label stays in the functional header chrome.

raw.name: GenericFilterableCount
raw.explanation: searchAiPresets count label stays in the functional header chrome.

nodes.name: GenericFilterableDivider
nodes.explanation: One-pixel divider inset to the same 16px horizontal header padding.

raw.name: GenericFilterableDivider
raw.explanation: One-pixel divider inset to the same 16px horizontal header padding.

nodes.name: GenericFilterableList
nodes.explanation: Generic filterable list uses full width and no preview panel.

raw.name: GenericFilterableList
raw.explanation: Generic filterable list uses full width and no preview panel.

nodes.explanation: searchAiPresets rows mirror the shared ListItem 40px dense-row contract with full-width hit bounds.
